text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro Dober invites me to go shopping
with her and Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is that music? It sounds like it's coming from over
there...

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Taiki Shuttle only scored
eighty-nine points! Looks like the grand prize of a
premium steak is still up for grabs!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aw, shoot! And here I was plannin' on havin' a
barbecue with everyone tonight!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Dober, I'm beggin' ya! Do this karaoke challenge
with me, please!

text_block_list.name: People in the Shopping District
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it looks like there's going to be a new
contender. Let's stay and watch her performance
too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Sorry, I'd love to help, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Hang on. Taiki, would it be all right if I
joined you instead?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Ryan's so considerate... Whenever I'm
uncomfortable, she always offers to do things in
my stead.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But, at this rate, I'll end up relying on her forever...

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
We're still open to new challengers, folks! Who
would like to take on the karaoke challenge and
bring home that steak?!
choice_data_list: Why not accept Ryan's kind offer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What?! But there's too many people here. She
shouldn't—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, it's okay, Ryan. I want to try. I'll give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text: Put your hands together for our next challenger!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I'm Mejiro Dober. I'm going to sing Here Comes Our Time... with my friend...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: H-hold on, are you sure about this, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The karaoke machine starts playing music, and
the eyes of everyone in the shopping district turn
to Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey! That's Mejiro Dober! I love her
singing!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
What is she going to sing? Do you think it'll be all
right if I take a video?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: Dober! Just pretend this is a concert!
Dober! Just pretend this is a concert!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A concert...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You can do this! Your fans always feel
your gratitude for their support in your
performance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I know you'll be great—I guarantee
it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You never know how fate will unfold. When you
meet a brand-new friend...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Great job, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're growing braver by the day. I could learn a
thing or two from you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Singing karaoke in the middle of the town might
not be a big deal to some, but for Mejiro Dober,
it's proof of how much she's grown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention she managed to score over ninety
points and won the premium steak! Afterward, the
four of us have a party together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (This is so embarrassing!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You never know how fate will unfold. When you
meet a brand-new friend...
choice_data_list: A new door opens, and off you two go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ryan? Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've taken a really courageous step forward,
and that's an incredible feat in and of itself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But sometimes, it can be hard to be brave alone.
When that happens, it's okay to get help from
others as you slowly get used to putting yourself
out there.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we sing the rest of the song
together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You two...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Look, the melody is starting again!
As my heart pounds like a beating drum
I want to know, what is this feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Does this mean our time has finally come?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right now, that moment seems so far away. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dober and Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But we realize that some way, somehow Our
journeys will lead us there some day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although they didn't manage to score above
ninety points, they gained something far more
valuable from the experience than a premium
steak.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Are you a mind reader?
choice_data_list:
Sorry, I wanted to offer advice since you looked
so lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, did I just say that out loud?!
choice_data_list:
Sorry, I wanted to offer advice since you looked
so lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list:
You can try next time once you're more
mentally ready.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ready? What are you guys talking about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. I'm just not very brave, that's
all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what you're talking about, but you're
definitely capable of being brave when the
situation calls for it, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So whenever you're ready, I want you to give it all
you've got. I'll be rooting for you too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you.
